'''fathopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldshit|oldshit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldshit|oldshit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthepeth|fæthepeth]] || [[word:fæthepej|fæthepej]] || [[word:fæthepesh|fæthepesh]] || [[word:fæthepe|fæthepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothopoth|fathothopoth]] || [[word:fathothopoj|fathothopoj]] || [[word:fathothoposh|fathothoposh]] || [[word:fathothopo|fathothopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathopoth|fathopoth]] || [[word:fathopoj|fathopoj]] || [[word:fathoposh|fathoposh]] || [[word:fathopo|fathopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofpoth|fathofpoth]] || [[word:fathofpoj|fathofpoj]] || [[word:fathofposh|fathofposh]] || [[word:fathofpof|fathofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathopotho|fathopotho]] || [[word:fathopojo|fathopojo]] || [[word:fathoposho|fathoposho]] || [[word:fathopoko|fathopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathopoth|fathopoth]] || [[word:fathopoj|fathopoj]] || [[word:fathoposh|fathoposh]] || [[word:fathopo|fathopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathopothol|fathopothol]] || [[word:fathopojol|fathopojol]] || [[word:fathoposhol|fathoposhol]] || [[word:fathopokol|fathopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathopothotho|fathopothotho]] || [[word:fathopojojo|fathopojojo]] || [[word:fathoposhosho|fathoposhosho]] || [[word:fathopoko|fathopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathopothon|fathopothon]] || [[word:fathopojon|fathopojon]] || [[word:fathoposhon|fathoposhon]] || [[word:fathopokon|fathopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathopothoro|fathopothoro]] || [[word:fathopojoro|fathopojoro]] || [[word:fathoposhoro|fathoposhoro]] || [[word:fathopokoro|fathopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
